sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5975" key="a)mfi/paltos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίπαλτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tossed about, re-echoing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">αὐδή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.27.10</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Besant.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
